title: Missing Postoperative Creatinine Outcomes Across the Development, Recalibration, and Evaluation of a Perioperative Acute Kidney Injury Model
description: Journal-neutral public reproducibility package for a methodological study of selective postoperative creatinine outcome observation across model development, recalibration, and post-exploration temporal evaluation. The package contains analysis code, aggregate outputs, figures, a complete JSON model specification, a consolidated workbook, quality-assurance records, and reproducibility documentation. It excludes raw or row-level patient data, serialized model objects, private runtime configuration, and manuscript files. The four-variable model is an auditable methodological probe and is not released for clinical care, triage, treatment selection, or deployment.
